title: amaryllis minor
intro: Amaryllis minor, also known as the lesser amaryllis or belladonna lily, is a plant species that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant is known for its toxic properties, with medicinal properties that include its potential to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Amaryllis minor include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne, while also being used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are believed to have medicinal properties when used in moderation and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
